Ionians:

A species of anthropomorphic, bipedal species with a reptile-like appearance. They were first contacted near the human planet of Ionia, named after the geographical region on Earth. They are often described as looking like the dragons from European folklore by humans, mostly due to their long scaly tails and prominent horns on the back of their head. They are roughly the same size as humans, standing around 160cm or 5ft 2”. They are also a bit weaker than the average human for both males and females due to a lower amount of gravity on their planet. The only exception for these norms are the Scions. Ionians appear to have a range of grey to black scales, since they evolved to be nocturnal creatures. they are friendly with multiple other alien species.they are friendly with multiple other alien species.

Scions:

Only Ionians related to a royal bloodline in the past could emit the spores. These special Ionians are called “Scions” Though that family had dissolved millennia ago, spreading the trait across thousands of individuals across the Ionian territories. These spores can allow the Scion to directly modify every aspect of a victim’s brain structure as they see fit, ranging from altering chemical outputs to killing sections of the brain entirely. Scions are bigger and stronger than normal Ionians, most of them growing to around 200cm tall. Scions also have a layer of bioluminescent tissue under their scales, whose color will change depending on genetics.

Character:

Name: Taressia

Traditional Ionian Name: (A series of sonic screeches)

Age: 82 (Middle aged, ~30 y.o. in human years)

Species: Ionian (Scion)

Height: 2m (~6ft 7")

History:

Her background is, much like her, shrouded in mystery. Some say that she was born in the slums as an unwanted child, left to fend for herself at a young age, though others say she was the child of a wealthy family, but had either been kicked out of ran away to pursue her abilities. Nobody can provide any evidence for both. All that is confirmed is that she had requested high command erase any record of her life before joining the military, because of gruesome and terrifying things she had done in the past, or just to keep her identity opaque? Nobody knows.

Personally:

She is seductive and mysterious and is unpredictable in every manner. She likes looking into other people’s minds and finding their deepest secrets and fears, decribing human brains as “tiny” or “compact” and complains that they barely give her enough space to work around in. Nobody knows if she is joking or dead serious. She loves the sense of control she has over people when they are infected with her spores, since she can end their lives with a literal thought.
